name: Venison Paprika
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the venison steak into one-inch cubes.
2. In a paper bag, mix 1/2 cup flour, salt, and pepper. Shake the bag to coat the steak cubes evenly.
3. In a large skillet, melt 1/6 lb butter over medium heat.
4. When the butter is hot, add the coated steak cubes to the skillet and brown them lightly, turning occasionally until golden brown on all sides.
5. Remove the steak cubes from the skillet and set aside.
6. Add finely diced onions, minced garlic, marjoram, diced tomatoes, sherry, and paprika to the skillet. Cook slowly with the lid on for 15 minutes.
7. Return the steak cubes to the skillet. Replace the lid and cook over low heat until the steak is tender, about 45 minutes to 1 hour.
8. Stir in the sour cream and serve hot.
